exam_format: Adaptive/CAT (EMT and Paramedic); Linear (AEMT and EMR)

testing_centers.notes: In-person testing at Pearson VUE authorized test centers nationwide. Schedule at home.pearsonvue.com/nremt. Government-issued photo ID required.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed book; no reference materials permitted. Computer-adaptive testing (CAT) for EMT and Paramedic levels — exam ends when the algorithm has determined competency or non-competency. Cognitive (written) exam only; does not include psychomotor skills assessment. Calculator not permitted.
renewal_options: All NREMT certifications are valid for 2 years. Renewal requires 24 hours of continuing education (CE) or completion of a refresher course. CE must be submitted through the NREMT online portal. Paramedics must include specific topic hours as defined by NREMT requirements.

retake_policy.notes: 15-day waiting period between failed attempts. Maximum 6 lifetime attempts per certification level. After 6 failed attempts, candidates must complete an additional refresher course before being eligible to retest. Each retake requires a new registration fee.

official_study_resources.title: NREMT Candidate Handbook
official_study_resources.notes: Free candidate handbook and exam FAQs available at nremt.org
